description: Curated official-plugin snapshot baked into the selfhelp-mobile-preview image. The web-preview build runs `plugins-sync.mjs --snapshot` against this file (NOT a live instance) so the listed plugins render natively (RN-on-web) in the preview; every other plugin falls back to OpenOnWebFallback. mobileRendererVersion is the mobile renderer contract the image is built against (mirrors @selfhelp/shared MOBILE_RENDERER_VERSION); plugin compatibility.mobile ranges gate against it.
